name: OnDeck
description_short: OnDeck is one of America's largest online small business lenders, a subsidiary of Enova International, offering term loans up to $400K and lines of credit up to $200K with same-day funding.
description_long:
OnDeck is one of America's largest online small business lenders and a subsidiary of publicly-traded Enova International. Since 2006, they have delivered over $25 billion in funding to more than 185,000 businesses across the United States.

OnDeck offers two core lending products: term loans ranging from $5,000 to $400,000 with repayment terms of 6 to 24 months, and unsecured business lines of credit from $6,000 to $200,000 with 12, 18, or 24-month terms. As a direct lender with no middleman brokers, OnDeck controls the entire lending process from application to funding.

Their standout feature is speed. OnDeck offers same-day funding Monday through Friday for applications approved before 10:30 AM Eastern, and instant disbursement for line of credit draws between $1,000 and $10,000 — available 24/7 and deposited within seconds to a linked account. The online application takes minutes and uses a soft credit pull for initial eligibility, meaning it does not impact the applicant's personal credit score.

To qualify, businesses need a minimum 625 FICO score, at least 1 year in operation, and $100,000 in annual revenue. Term loans are secured with a general lien on the business, while lines of credit are fully unsecured with no collateral requirement.

OnDeck publishes its average APR data, which is unusual in the alternative lending industry. For the first half of 2025, the average APR was 56.4% for term loans and 56.6% for lines of credit. While these rates are high compared to SBA or traditional bank loans, they reflect the speed and accessibility OnDeck provides to businesses that may not qualify for conventional financing.

Repayment is handled through automatic deductions — daily or weekly for term loans, and weekly or monthly for lines of credit. OnDeck excludes over 25 industries from eligibility, including auto dealers, firearms retailers, gambling operations, nonprofits, and others. The service is not available in North Dakota.
affiliate_program: CPA-based program for small business loan referrals

tiers.name: Business Line of Credit
features: No annual fees, no monthly fees, no draw fees

features.collateral_required: Term loans: general lien. LOC: none

pros: Same-day funding Monday through Friday for applications approved before 10:30 AM ET, with instant LOC draws available 24/7
$25 billion funded across 185,000+ businesses since 2006 — one of the largest track records in online business lending
No hard credit pull for initial eligibility check — soft pull only, no impact on personal credit score
Lines of credit are fully unsecured with no collateral requirement, no annual fees, and no draw fees
Publishes average APR data (56.4% term, 56.6% LOC) — more transparent than most alternative lenders
U.S.-based loan advisors with direct lending model — no middleman brokers
cons: High APR: average 56.4% on term loans makes OnDeck significantly more expensive than SBA or traditional bank loans
Not available in North Dakota, and over 25 industries are excluded (auto dealers, firearms, gambling, nonprofits, and more)
Daily or weekly automatic repayment schedule can strain cash flow for seasonal or irregular-revenue businesses
No SBA loans offered — borrowers wanting government-backed rates and longer terms must go elsewhere
Term loans secured with a general lien on the business — not truly unsecured like the line of credit product
best_for: Established small businesses (1+ year, $100K+ revenue, 625+ FICO) that need $5K-$400K fast and prioritize speed over lowest rate
Business owners who want unsecured revolving credit up to $200K with instant draws and no prepayment penalty
Companies in non-excluded industries that have been turned down by banks but need working capital within 24 hours
diagnosis: OnDeck is a strong fit for established businesses that need fast capital and are willing to pay premium rates for speed and convenience. The average APR of 56.4% is high, but the same-day funding, soft credit pull, and unsecured LOC option make it one of the most accessible online lenders. Not suitable for startups (1-year minimum), very small businesses (under $100K revenue), or rate-sensitive borrowers who can wait weeks for SBA approval.
services: Term loans from $5,000 to $400,000 for working capital, inventory, payroll, or growth
Business lines of credit from $6,000 to $200,000 with revolving access
Same-day funding for approved term loan applications
Instant funding for LOC draws $1,000-$10,000 available 24/7
Soft credit pull pre-qualification (no impact on credit score)
Online application and account management portal
Automatic daily, weekly, or monthly repayment via ACH
typical_results_timeline: Application takes minutes online. Approval decision same day. Funding as fast as same business day (term loans) or instantly (LOC draws $1K-$10K).
